author: @TheHillsHaveFPV
text: DJI drones are not 'spyware'. The reason for the ban is because of our reliance on them. If you look at the original DJI drones, the internals were all US-made. (we could stop supplying them with components, theyt'd have no drones) But if you look at the new DJI drones, its entirely Chinese made. And we have no American competition. Which means  now at any time china can stop supplying equipment we depend on for law enforcement, search & rescue, and  infrastructure inspection, etc.
